twitter_thread: Earned $12,493 in passive income last year with SCHD, VYMI, and JEPI.
JEPI's 7.2% yield beats SCHD's 2.9% and VYMI's 3.4%.
Investing $10,000 in Coca-Cola, Johnson & Johnson, and Procter & Gamble generates $1,239 in yearly income.
175 Barclays shares yield £1,000 in passive income, or 5.7% annual return.
Coca-Cola's 59-year dividend streak makes it a reliable choice.
Avoid dividend stocks with payout ratios above 80%, like Kinder Morgan's 92%.
What's your top dividend stock for passive income? #passiveincome #dividendinvesting
